scores.correctness_notes: All three required sections (services, checks, log-targets) are present and correctly structured. Environment variables, HTTP health check, and log target are all properly defined with correct syntax.
scores.hallucination_notes: The 'on-success' and 'on-failure' service fields are not standard Pebble layer spec fields — the correct field is 'on-check-failure' which maps check names to actions. The gold standard uses 'on-check-failure' to link checks to services. Also missing the link between checks and service restart behavior via 'on-check-failure'.
